channel.title: art on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in art on evocations

item.title: Art month
item.description: This month I’m going to try to make some art, because it’s fun. I’m going to do it every day, because then I will get better quickly. Every day I’ll post something I make here. Day 1 – Emerald 5 Hours Day 2 – Fighter 1 Hour Day 3 – June 2 Hours
